recent_calls.summary: The user called to schedule a same-day service appointment for a furnace issue where the fan is not working properly. The agent collected all necessary information, confirmed the details with the user, and informed them that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect her with a live representative. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user, Megan, called Budget to reconnect with a previous agent regarding scheduling a plumber appointment for Monday. The agent, Sophie, attempted to transfer Megan to the appropriate live agent. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user returned a call and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent was unable to understand the user's request due to unintelligible audio and promptly transferred the call.

The user called to schedule an HVAC inspection due to condensation issues and temperature differences in their home. The agent collected all necessary information and successfully booked an appointment for the next day at 4 PM. The user declined to provide feedback but was satisfied with the booking process.
The user requested to speak with a live agent and the call was successfully transferred to another agent. The initial agent facilitated the transfer promptly without any issues.

Comfort from American Home Shield called Budget to follow up on an incomplete dispatch request and requested to schedule a customer appointment for the ninth at 10 AM. The agent confirmed the customer's contact number and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user, Kelly, called Budget and was greeted by Sophie. After a brief exchange, the user requested to speak with someone else, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent.

The user, Erica Alexander, called to inquire about the technician's arrival time. The agent confirmed the appointment details and informed her that the technician, Cole, is scheduled to arrive from 3 PM onwards and that she would receive notifications when the technician is on the way. The user then requested to speak to a representative, and the call was successfully transferred.
The user called and asked if they were speaking to a live person. The agent confirmed they were an assistant and offered help. The call was brief and ended shortly after.

Jim called to schedule a cooling system repair appointment for his residential property. The agent confirmed the issue with the air conditioner fan and booked a technician visit for Thursday, July 9th at 8 AM. The call ended with the appointment successfully booked and the user declining to provide feedback.
The call was very brief and disconnected shortly after it started, with the agent attempting to initiate the conversation but no response from the user.

The user, Alan, who is the owner of a Subway restaurant at 9820 Manchester Road, Rock Hill, Missouri, called to report issues with the veggie and meat units not working well and requested service or Freon. The agent confirmed service availability in the area and began collecting details for the service request. The call ended with the user declining to provide the zip code.
The user called about an issue with their AC unit and requested to speak with a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user contacted the agent regarding their AC unit and expressed interest in scheduling an appointment. The agent attempted to clarify the nature of the service request but the call ended before further details were provided.
The user called to get a quote and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer successfully without any issues.
The user, Chipo, called and requested to speak with a representative. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user requested to be connected to a representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The agent Sophie greeted the user Daniel and attempted to connect him with a live representative. The call was successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a manager or representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Derek Jones called to schedule an emergency service for his four mini split air conditioning units that are not working. The agent documented the emergency and informed Derek that the team will contact him first thing the next business day. Derek declined further assistance and the call ended with the agent confirming the follow-up.

The user called to schedule an appointment but decided to call back during regular business hours instead of scheduling now. The agent provided office hours and offered to take information for a callback, but the user declined and chose to call back later.

The call was initiated by the user but due to unintelligible audio and lack of response, the agent was unable to assist. The agent attempted to engage the user but the call ended without any meaningful interaction.

The user called back after hours to report that their AC fan is not turning on. The agent collected the user's contact information, service address, and preferred callback time for early next business day. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs, and the agent confirmed a follow-up call would be made.

The user, Megan Putnam, called to follow up on a previous request for commercial water heater service after not receiving a callback. The agent documented the request and assured Megan that the team will follow up on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user called to confirm an appointment for tomorrow at 10 AM with a live person. The agent explained that live transfers are not available after-hours but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further assistance needed.

The user, Susan, called after hours requesting to speak with Gigi and asked for a callback the next day. The agent informed her that Gigi was unavailable but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further requests from the user.

April Weatherly called to schedule a follow-up service appointment for her air conditioner that is still not working. The agent confirmed the appointment preference for tomorrow afternoon and verified the contact details and service address. April declined information about maintenance programs and providing feedback, and the call ended with the agent confirming that the team will reach out to confirm the appointment.

Justin called to request a quote for replacing a water heater with an expansion tank and a full HVAC unit for a small apartment. The agent confirmed details, noted the service address and contact information, and scheduled a follow-up for early morning, with Justin planning to call back to schedule the service. The agent also offered information about maintenance programs, which Justin accepted, and the call ended positively with Justin providing excellent feedback.

The user, Kay, called after hours wanting to set an appointment with a technician on a work order. The agent, Evie, informed Kay that a live agent was unavailable but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended with no further questions from the user.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to follow up on the progress of their hiring process and the next interview. The agent informed the user that they cannot access hiring details but assured that the message would be passed to the appropriate team and that someone would follow up on the next business day. The call ended with the user declining further assistance.

Mary Brennan called to report that her air conditioner is not cooling properly and expressed concern about the issue. The agent identified as an after-hours assistant and clarified the nature of the call, but the user decided to wait until the next day for further assistance. The call ended without a service appointment being scheduled.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user called and requested to speak with Cece. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate person.

The user, Scott McKechner, called to inquire about the time window for an AC appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent.
The agent called the user to check in or follow up, but the user indicated they did not want to engage. The call was then transferred to another number as per the agent's action.
The user called to return a call from CG and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user called to inquire about the arrival time of a service or person and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to schedule a home warranty appointment for heating and cooling service because their system was not cooling. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the information, and the user declined additional maintenance program information. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user called looking for Miss Nicole or Amy, and the agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent by transferring the call. The call was successfully transferred to another number.
The user requested to speak with Miss Nicole, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call lasted 21 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to discuss a callback regarding their furnace and AC bids and wanted to ask questions to finalize the situation. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
